      "text": "9. Kad uu fchi to Lauschu tau-

teem Affireveem eedoht.
"

    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Un ta fazzija us Jawu
Meitu / ko ta pahr wiſſu Jawu

um/ tawa Pilsfakta Wezzajus.
"

    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Un kad tee pee winnas

ka juhs to Pilsfaktu gribbat
teem Eenaidneeleem eedoht/ ja
ras Kungs va fchihm Deenahm winnam patiks.
jums ne palihdsehs.
"

    {

      "text": "12. Un nu/ kahdi juhs effat/
ka juhs Deewu lahrdinajat schař

Behrneem?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. Nu tad/ baudajtees tikai

"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "14. Jo juhs nedß to Dsilku-
